privileged_info_summary: Task lacks a metadata field in task.json, so no metadata claims exist to verify. However, code analysis confirms the task operates on the 'demodb' OrientDB database with synthetically injected duplicate data: 3 duplicate Hotel records (Hotel Artemide in Rome, The Savoy in London, Copacabana Palace in Rio de Janeiro) and 2 duplicate Profile records (John Smith and Yuki Tanaka). The setup_task.sh script creates exactly 7 edges connecting these records. The task requires merging these duplicates while preserving all edges and restoring a UNIQUE index on Profiles.Email.
